name: career-engine
postCreateCommand: if [ -n "$GIT_USER_EMAIL" ]; then git config --global user.email "$GIT_USER_EMAIL"; fi && if [ -n "$GIT_USER_NAME" ]; then git config --global user.name "$GIT_USER_NAME"; fi && if [ -n "$GIT_SIGNING_KEY" ]; then git config --global user.signingkey "$GIT_SIGNING_KEY"; fi && if [ -n "$GIT_COMMIT_GPGSIGN" ]; then git config --global commit.gpgsign "$GIT_COMMIT_GPGSIGN"; fi
